author: Pierre de Roissy
title: Manuale de mysteriis Ecclesiae / Speculum ecclesiae
remarks: (BnF nouv. acq. lat. 232, 4r-163r)[Kuttner, Stephan. "Pierre De Roissy and Robert of Flamborough." Traditio 2 (1944): 492-499, https://doi.org/10.1017/S0362152900017281.][See Kennedy, "The Handbook of Master Peter Chancellor of Chartres," Mediaeval Studies, V (1943), 1-38; Alverny, M.-Th. d', "Les mystères de l'Eglise, d'après Pierre de Roissy", in: Mélanges Crozet, Poitiers, 1966, [pp. 1085-1104] pp. 1094 sq]
order_rank: chancellor of Chartres (1208), disciple of Fulk and renowned preacher in Paris, author of glosses and sermons
